originalTitle: Angst over SpaceX IPO adds to dive in tech stocks
summary: Technology stocks tumbled on Tuesday, extending a swoon that began in early June, as investors anxiously await the historic SpaceX IPO later this week and retreat from hot parts of the AI playbook.
content: Technology stocks tumbled on Tuesday, extending a swoon that began in early June, as investors anxiously await the historic SpaceX IPO later this week and retreat from hot parts of the AI playbook.
chineseTitle: 对 SpaceX IPO 的担忧加剧了科技股的跳水
chineseSummary: 科技股周二暴跌，延续了 6 月初开始的颓势，投资者焦急地等待本周晚些时候历史性的 SpaceX 首次公开募股，并从人工智能领域的热门部分撤退。
chineseContent: 科技股周二暴跌，延续了 6 月初开始的颓势，投资者焦急地等待本周晚些时候历史性的 SpaceX 首次公开募股，并从人工智能领域的热门部分撤退。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
